subcodes.first_line: The Truth hath appeared with a sovereignty that all the hosts of the world cannot withhold, nor can the conditions of nations impede. At every moment it proclaimeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الحق بسلطان لاتمنعه جنود العالم و لا شئونات الامم ینطق فی کل الاحیان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
